name: STO SE+CO.KGAA VZO O.N.
summary: STO SE+CO.KGAA VZO O.N. is a German company specializing in products and systems for building coatings, including facade insulation systems, facade coatings, plasters, interior paints, and acoustic systems. The company operates as a Kommanditgesellschaft auf Aktien (KGaA), a form of German limited partnership with shares, and is headquartered in Stühlingen, Germany. The VZO designation indicates preference shares.
